channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Urges Congress to Roll Back Intoxicating Hemp Ban and Protect CBD Access
item.description: President Trump is pressing Congress to reverse a recently enacted ban on intoxicating hemp-derived products and maintain consumer access to full-spectrum CBD.

item.title: Virginia Redistricting Dispute Moves to State Courts After Voter Approval
item.description: Congressional district maps approved by Virginia voters face potential invalidation as the state's judicial system reviews multiple pending legal challenges.

item.title: Michael Unwraps the Smear
item.description: A new biopic revives the legacy and public appeal of a celebrated folk icon.

item.title: Dobbs Attorney Faced Pressure to Step Back from Roe Challenge
item.description: The attorney who defended Mississippi's 15-week abortion law before the Supreme Court proceeded despite widespread counsel advising against taking the case.

item.title: TMZ Builds Washington Presence After Earlier Bureau Attempts Failed
item.description: TMZ's renewed effort to establish a Washington bureau is gaining traction, producing notable results where previous attempts had fallen short.
